hero.subtitle: A passionate web developer crafting beautiful and functional digital experiences
hero.subtitleLine1: A brief shelter from the daily rain of information.
hero.subtitleAccent: WEB tales told under the eaves.

story.title: Why 'Amayadori' (Taking Shelter from Rain)?
story.description1: When caught in sudden rain, the time spent taking shelter under an eave is special. Like the proverb 'slow and steady wins the race,' stopping for a moment brings new discoveries.
story.description2: This podcast is the same. While being chased by daily development work, we stop for a moment to share technical talks and daily insights. We want to be such a warm place.

profile.title: Kuwahara KEETH Kiyohito
profile.description1: For 10 years since stepping into the world of web development, I have walked alongside technological progress. As the host of 'Amayadori to WEB no Kobanashi,' I started the program with the desire to make technology more accessible and enjoyable to share.
profile.description2: With extensive experience from frontend to backend, I currently work as a full-stack developer. I cherish the warm atmosphere of chatting with friends over coffee.

webdev.title: Into Web Development
webdev.description: Studied computer science in university and first touched HTML and CSS.

frontend.title: Frontend Specialization
frontend.description: Learned React and Vue.js, diving deep into modern frontend development.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Developer
fullstack.description: Learned Node.js and database design, started working as a full-stack developer.

podcast.title: Podcast Launch
podcast.description: Started 'Amayadori to WEB no Kobanashi.' Sharing technical knowledge with many people.

community.title: Community Growth
community.description: Listener community grew and expanded into various episodes.

profile.philosophy: I believe in the power of technology to transform lives and make the world a better place. I am passionate about creating digital experiences that are not only beautiful but also functional and user-friendly. I am constantly learning and evolving to stay ahead in the fast-paced world of web development.

hero.title: THE VOICE BEHIND THE MIC.
hero.subtitle: Everything about Amayadori to WEB no Kobanashi.fm
hero.label: PODCAST FEATURE

concept.title: Concept
concept.description1: 'Amayadori to WEB no Kobanashi.fm' is a podcast where you take a break from the daily rain of information and listen to small web tales under the eaves.
concept.description2: From frontend-focused web technology topics to daily insights and creative discussions, we deliver content you can enjoy in a relaxed atmosphere.

2020.title: Show Launch
2020.description: Started broadcasting with the desire to casually chat about web technology.

2021.title: Growing Audience
2021.description: Through broadcasting, the listener gradually grew.

2022.title: Show Expansion
2022.description: Launched new show series and expanded the range of topics covered.

2023.title: 800+ Episodes
2023.description: Reached 800 episodes across all shows, supported by many listeners.

2024.title: Increasing Shows
2024.description: Operating 6 shows and continuing to grow with the community.

2025.title: Participating in Events
2025.description: WEB CREATOR PODCAST DAY, Engineer Podcast Meetup #2 appearances

personality.title: Host
personality.name: Kuwahara Kiyohito (Keeth)
personality.description: Web Developer / Podcaster. With broad experience from frontend to backend, running the show with the desire to make tech talks more accessible and enjoyable.

listen.title: How to Listen
listen.description: Enjoy the show on your favorite platform.

contact.label: // SEND FREQUENCY
contact.title: SIGNAL.
contact.desc1: Slip your thoughts into the sound of rain and send them our way.
contact.desc2: From technical questions to show feedback, or just casual chats you'd like someone to hear.

community.title: Join the Community
community.description: Real-time discussions and post-show chats happen on our Discord server.
